title: pluchea absinthioides
intro: Pluchea absinthioides, also known as Chinese aloe or wormwood bush, is a shrub-like plant in the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Pluchea absinthioides is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices, and its roots and leaves can be dried or made into extracts for medicinal use.
